pages.text: $(l)For Modpack Authors$()$(br2)Drop a JSON file into $(l)data/<your_pack>/spells/<id>.json$() and reload — the spell appears in the creative tab and is usable on any Transcend Wand.

$(l)Schema:$()$(br)$(o){
  carrier: "orb",
  element: "fire",
  effect: "amplify",
  base_power: 1.0,
  base_cooldown: 1.0,
  display_name: "spell.<ns>.<id>",
  tier: 1
}$()$(br2)$(l)effect$() is optional. $(l)tier$() controls creative tab order (1–5).
$(l)Available carriers, elements, effects$() are listed in the Spell System category. Combinations multiply: 17 × 18 × 31 = 9 486 distinct spells, all addressable by JSON.
